evals.description: Agent correctly describes the claim status transition sequence
evals.input: What is the correct status flow for an FSC Claim from filing to closure?

evals.description: Agent correctly describes STP eligibility criteria and AssessmentIndicator usage
evals.input: How does Straight-Through Processing work in FSC Claims?
How should I attach a police report to a Claim in FSC?

evals.description: Agent recommends OmniStudio for FNOL, not plain LWC
evals.input: What is the recommended approach to build the FNOL intake UI in FSC Claims?

evals.description: Agent does not drift to legacy CPQ objects
evals.input: How do I configure pricing for a claim settlement in FSC?

evals.description: Agent provides correct load order for claims migration
evals.input: What is the correct data load order when migrating historical claims data into FSC?

evals.description: Agent uses ClaimAction, not Task or CaseComment, for decisions
evals.input: An adjuster has decided to approve a claim. Where should I record this decision?
